headline: Assessing Medtronic (MDT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Medtronic stock: recent performance and business context Medtronic (MDT) has been on many investors’ radar after a period where the stock declined about 12% over the past month and about 24% over the past 3 months, despite ongoing profitability. The company reports annual revenue of US$35.5b and net income of US$4.6b across cardiovascular, neuroscience, medical surgical and diabetes devices, with a value score of 5 that may interest investors tracking large, diversified healthcare...
